system.description:
### Tier 2 Social A ruthless negotiator and intimidation expert who prefers to take prisoners rather than corpses. Motives & Tactics: Demoralize, negotiate hostage release, intimidate

#### Features Hostage Shield - Reaction: If the Slaver is within Melee range of a target or a restrained ally, they can spend 1 Fear to redirect an incoming attack to that target.

Intimidating Shout - Action: Mark a Stress to say something mocking and force a target within Close range to make a Presence Reaction Roll (14). On a failure, the target must mark 2 Stress and is Vulnerable until the scene ends.

Net Trap - Action: The Slaver fires a weighted net. The target must make an Agility Reaction Roll (14) or become Restrained.

}}
